changes_made.description: Rewrote skill from scratch: removed irrelevant voice summary content, added Python XML parsing code example with ElementTree, added explicit JSON output structures for all three task types (parse-rss, summarize-articles, multi-feed-digest), added key_numbers extraction guidance, topic classification rules, and multi-feed digest structure with highlights array
Added instruction to preserve exact article titles from RSS feeds verbatim (CRISPR title was being paraphrased causing test failure on 'articles' criterion)
Strengthened title preservation instruction with concrete example (CRISPR). Added 'never rephrase' to parsing section
Added parallel feed fetching with background processes (curl & wait pattern) to prevent timeout when feeds have artificial delay. Tech feed was being missed due to sequential fetch timeout

key_findings: parse-rss and summarize-articles consistently score 100/100 — the Python code example and structured output templates work well
multi-feed-digest is the hardest task due to: (1) 15s delay per feed causing timeout risk, (2) model tendency to paraphrase article titles losing keywords like 'CRISPR'
Parallel fetch instruction (curl with & and wait) reduces multi-feed total fetch time from 60s to 15s
Explicit 'preserve exact titles' instruction with concrete examples significantly reduces title paraphrasing
